title: ITR filing 2026: Received dividend income or bonus shares? Here’s how they are taxed and reported
summary: Investors receiving dividend income or bonus shares must consider tax implications while filing ITR. Dividends are now taxable in the hands of investors, subject to slab rates and TDS if over ₹10,000. Bonus shares are tax-free upon receipt but result in taxable capital gains upon sale. Details here.

title: NSC vs tax-saving FD: All you need to know about returns, lock-in periods and tax benefits
summary: While both National Savings Certificates and tax-saving FDs share a standard five-year tenure, they differ significantly in compounding frequency, interest rates, and overall structures.

title: FII tax exemption on G-Secs explained: What changed, how foreign investors can invest and key details
summary: Government exempts FIIs from taxes on interest income and capital gains from Indian government securities, aiming to attract global investors and stabilize the rupee. All you need to know.

title: 'Spent ₹1.66 lakh in May': Bengaluru couple breaks down cost of raising a child, caring for a pet and staying fit
summary: A Bengaluru-based couple has gone viral after sharing a detailed breakdown of their family's monthly expenses, revealing they spent ₹1.66 lakh in May.

title: Co-owning a home and tax liability: Why shared ownership is a smart move for couples to safeguard financial future
summary: Indian families often include a spouse's name in property titles for strategic and practical reasons. Opting for shared ownership can safeguard a partner's financial future, streamline estate planning, and significantly reduce the likelihood of bitter inheritance conflicts down the line.

title: ATMs are running out of cash. Should you be worried? Explained
summary: ATMs could run short of cash as operators face challenges in replenishing machines, despite India having a record ₹42.54 lakh crore in currency circulation.

title: Rs 5,750 crore Adani block deal: SBI Mutual Fund picks stake from GQG
summary: GQG Partners sold stakes in Adani Enterprises and Adani Energy Solutions worth about Rs 5,750 crore through block deals, with SBI Mutual Fund acquiring the shares. The transactions are seen as portfolio rebalancing after a strong recovery in Adani Group stocks over the past year.

title: Oyo parent Prism Hotels receives Sebi nod for IPO
summary: Prism Hotels, Oyo’s parent, received Sebi approval for a Rs 6,650 crore IPO. Targeting a $7–8 billion valuation, the firm will use funds for expansion and strengthening its balance sheet to support its ongoing push toward company profitability.

title: US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq slides as chip stocks fall, jobs data fuels hawkish Fed fears

title: Stable rates, steady demand: Why real estate players see RBI's pause as a confidence booster
summary: With retail inflation easing to 3.48% in April and remaining below the RBI's 4% target, industry stakeholders see little immediate pressure on interest rates, creating a favourable backdrop for the housing market.

title: Rate hikes are coming, RBI has sent a clear signal, says Anubhuti Sahay, Standard Chartered
